meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2021 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2021 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.
2021 source pages are historical official result PDFs; program, outline, entry roster, schedule, live速報, and YouTube links were not promoted unless separately confirmed.

events.name: 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第7回北海道代表選考会
includedChampionships: 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第7回北海道代表選考会
第5回 全日本高校パワーリフティング選手権大会 北海道予選会

sources.title: 2021年北海道協会大会結果PDF
sources.evidenceLines: HPA top page year navigation links 2021 to 2021.pdf. PDF pages for 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第7回北海道代表選考会 state 2021年5月8日-9日 and 会場 江別市民体育館; the same result block also includes 第5回 高校男子 entries.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not promote athlete rows into confirmed histories without matching athlete identity, category/class, event date, and PDF row.
Record marks in the PDF require separate北海道記録/JPA verification before summarizing as record-holder achievements.
国体代表選考 and 高校予選 labels must remain explicit when used by future importers.

venue.name: 名寄市スポーツセンター

sources.title: 2021年北海道協会大会結果PDF
sources.evidenceLines: PDF pages for 2021年度 北海道シングルベンチプレス選手権大会 and 第25回北海道クラシックベンチプレス選手権大会 state 2021年7月18日 and 会場 名寄市スポーツセンター. The result block also identifies 第31回フルギア and 第25回クラシック.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Bench-only results are not interchangeable with three-lift histories unless the consuming feature explicitly handles event type.
Do not create athlete histories from this file without row-level verification.
Equipped, classic, and single-bench labels must remain distinct in any future importer.

sources.evidenceLines: PDF pages for 2021年度 秋季北海道パワーリフティング選手権大会 state 2021年10月16日-17日 and 会場 江別市民体育館. The page labels include 第24回北海道クラシックパワーリフティング選手権大会 and 第50回北海道男子（フルギア）.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not promote athlete rows into confirmed histories without matching athlete identity, category/class, event date, and PDF row.
Keep equipped and classic divisions distinct when a future importer reads this source.
Do not infer athlete progression comments from this addendum alone.
